asset_scope.scope_note: canonical_registry.environments[] is empty; all environment assets are registered under canonical_registry.other[] as background and prop types per concept-freeze design decision.

step_0_source_resolution.notes: All 20 environment assets (18 backgrounds + 2 props) have source_strategy=llm_image_generation in asset-registry.json, which maps to ai_generated. Step 0 skipped per node-spec. All assets proceed directly to Step 1 (Pre-Spec) and Step 2 (Generate).

step_1_pre_spec.note: dimension=2d; no 3d-source-asset-spec required. View mode: board_grid (match-3 puzzle) with visual_novel staging for character dialogue. 3-layer parallax defined.

render_to_2d.note: No assets with dimension=3d or 2.5d. All environment assets are 2D. render-to-2d-asset-generation not required.

background_spec_summary.ui_safe_zone: center 60% of screen horizontally kept free from dense foreground elements

石板路·木店铺·竹林·暖绿村镇
樱花花田·蝴蝶·木观景台·粉粉花海

露天温泉·蒸汽·竹篱笆·红叶/雪
灯塔光束·星空·深海夜色

asset_state_updates.note: Assets remain placeholder in art-asset-inventory.json until actual image generation is executed post-approval. Specs are complete and ready for generation.

review_checklist_evidence.tile_seamless: N/A — backgrounds are full-bleed JPGs; seamless tiling not required for background assets
review_checklist_evidence.parallax_layers_match_config: PASS — 3 parallax layers (sky_far/midground/foreground_elements) defined, matching art-pipeline-config.parallax_layers=3
review_checklist_evidence.light_direction_unified: PASS — all 6 chapters use upper-right soft diffuse lighting model. Chapter 6 night: same direction with moonlight+lighthouse secondary. Consistent across all scenes.
review_checklist_evidence.six_chapters_distinct: PASS — each chapter has unique visual signature, dominant hue, scene type, and prop vocabulary. See chapter_visual_signatures above.
review_checklist_evidence.restoration_states_distinct: PASS — 3 states per chapter with clearly different saturation/brightness profiles. Before: 8-15%, In-progress: 28-52%, Restored: 55-82%.

completion_condition_check.all_assets_not_placeholder_check: PENDING — assets spec_ready but current_state still 'placeholder' in inventory; image generation not yet executed. Completion per spec: spec documents complete, HTML review pending write.
